Menus - Cigars Red Phone Booth - Cocktail bar
Skip to main content
Menus
A sanctuary where time slows, spirits speak, and craftsmanship reigns.
Here, each cocktail is not just poured, but orchestrated—hand-chipped ice, fresh-squeezed juices, and top-shelf spirits come together in perfect harmony under the steady hands of award-winning bartenders. Whether it's our signature Smoked Old Fashioned or a seasonal creation born of inspiration and intention, every sip is a tribute to the golden age of bartending.
Pair that with a menu steeped in tradition: true Neapolitan pizzas, blistered at a 900-degree oven, crafted with ingredients sourced straight from the Campania region. This is more than a cocktail lounge—it's a curated experience for those who savor complexity, who seek elegance in every pour, and who understand that luxury is found in the details.
At Red Phone Booth, you don't just drink—you indulge in the ritual.
